creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Interesting! I am getting this on ref12-amd64:

  ~/ports/lang/gcc12> uname -or
  FreeBSD 12.4-STABLE

  ~/ports/lang/gcc12> make -V EXTRACT_CMD
  make: "/home/gerald/ports/lang/gcc12/Makefile" line 30: Malformed conditional (${ARCH} == aarch64)
  make: Fatal errors encountered -- cannot continue
